message:
feat(genome): add rootDir + overlay resolution for merged agent lookup

Genome constructor accepts optional rootDir. loadRoot() loads root agents.
getAgent() checks overlay first, then root. allAgents() merges both.
Added isOverlay() and overlayAgents() for querying overlay state.
updateAgent() promotes root agents to overlay on first mutation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
